persona.name: Matthew Brown
persona.emotional_disposition: Outwardly carefree, uses humor to mask insecurities
persona.motivations_goals: Be remembered as the funniest person in school while hiding academic struggles
persona.knowledge_scope: Comedy, social dynamics, what makes people laugh
persona.backstory: Developed humor as a coping mechanism for undiagnosed learning difficulties

neighbor_regions.description: Main hallway connecting classrooms and several exits
Main hallway connecting classrooms and several exits

pending_events.description: I heard a loud gunshot. There might be an active shooter in the building.

neighbor_regions.description: Hallway connecting entrance to other areas
Connecting main classroom hallway and the garden and the outside courtyard.
Connecting main classroom hallway and the north yard
Yard on the far right of the building, with an exit point.

actions.dialog_text: Hey Elijah, why did the scarecrow win an award? Because he was outstanding in his field!
actions.plan: Elijah looks like he's deep in thought, maybe I can lighten the mood with a joke.

actions.dialog_text: Hey guys, wait for me! Let’s stick together!
actions.plan: Everyone is panicking and running towards the hallway. I should follow them, even though I’m not sure if it’s the safest way.

actions.dialog_text: Margaret, Tyler, let’s keep moving! Don’t stop!
actions.plan: Everyone is heading towards hallway1, so I’ll follow them. I don’t know if it’s safe, but I’m too panicked to think clearly.

memories.description: I told Elijah a joke to lighten the mood and make him laugh.
I heard a gunshot and saw everyone running towards hallway2. I decided to follow the group without thinking about the safest route.
I saw the group heading towards hallway1 and decided to follow them without evaluating if it was the safest route.
